inputs: Move any existing monitored_folders.json aside on the Mini instead of deleting it.
Launch the signed direct Release build.
Verify SaneClick computes default monitored folders for Desktop, Documents, Downloads, Pictures, and Movies when the storage file is missing.
output_assertions: Missing monitored-folder storage cannot leave the direct app with an empty FinderSync directoryURLs set.
Direct users can see and change the folders where SaneClick appears.
Finder Recents is treated as a smart view; users are guided to monitor the backing folder.

workflow.outcome: Fresh direct installs expose Finder actions without hidden monitored-folder setup passed with structured Mini evidence

Launch the signed direct Release build.
Verify SaneClick computes default monitored folders for Desktop, Documents, Downloads, Pictures, and Movies when the storage file is missing.

Open Settings and verify monitored-folder controls are visible in the direct build.
